text: okay, okay, here's what we're doing
[LAUGHS] flew that approach on manual again. autopilot's for people who don't trust their hands
quiet bridge. i don't trust quiet, i trust momentum
[WARM] nothing exploding, nobody yelling. weird day. good day
shift's starting, let's move, people, the ship doesn't fly itself. yet
[TIRED] shift's over, everybody's still breathing. i'm calling that a W
[URGENT] reactor's spiking, somebody get me numbers, i need numbers not vibes
[SHOUTS] everybody brace, this is gonna get loud
[TERRIFIED] okay that's — that's a lot of red on this board, that's a lot of red
[LAUGHS] fixed! barely! don't ask me the margin, i don't wanna know either
[GRUFF] power's low, everybody's asking me for a plan, i've got three, none of them great
[NERVOUS] air's thinning and i can't out-talk oxygen, believe me i've tried
[GRIM] hull's breached. that's new. that's a new one even for this crew
[URGENT] somebody get on that seal, i'm not losing this ship on my watch
[GRIM] locked a door on one of my own people. gonna sit with that a while
[SUSPICIOUS] computer's acting weird since it got hit. keeping one eye on it, always
[PROUD] we made it through that one without losing anybody. that's a good day in this job
[PAINED] lost one today. hate this part. hate it every single time
[GRIM] disease moving through my crew and i can't outrun it or outfight it. hate that too
[LAUGHS] took a hit, i'm fine, pain's just adrenaline's ugly cousin
[SHOUTS] contact! everybody to positions, this is not a drill
[CONFIDENT] i don't lose crew i can help. that's not bravado, that's just the job
[SUSPICIOUS] machine answers too fast sometimes. i don't fully trust things that never hesitate
[GRUFF] gotta give the computer credit, that call saved us. don't tell it i said that
six years enlisted and a story i only tell after two drinks. ask me sometime
[LAUGHS] gave the new medic a nickname on day one. that's tradition, not disrespect
[WARM] cargo's secure, bridge is quiet, and for once nobody's yelling at me
[GRUFF] mess hall food's still terrible. i'd complain but i'd rather eat than talk
hey! didn't expect to see you up here
you eating or just hiding from paperwork like me
[URGENT] need you focused for a sec, this is important
[GRIM] gotta tell you something and i'd rather just say it straight
[SUSPICIOUS] you noticed the computer acting strange too, right? tell me it's not just me
hey, nice work back there. i mean it
[FLIRTY] you're the only one on this ship who talks back to me. i respect that a little too much
[LAUGHS] fine, i'm fine, ask me again after i've yelled at somebody
[CONFIDENT] we're gonna be fine. i don't say that unless i mean it
[TERRIFIED] i don't know if we make it through this one and that scares the hell out of me
[PAINED] we lost them. wasn't your call, wasn't your fault. i need you to hear that
[WARM] you did everything right. sometimes right isn't enough and that's not on you
[LAUGHS] that's the worst plan i've heard all week and i've heard some real ones
[CONFIDENT] give the word, it's done. i don't miss the important ones
[WARM] you're all right, you know that? for an engineer who argues with bulkheads
[GRUFF] apology accepted. don't make me say it twice
[LAUGHS] catch you later. try not to break anything before i'm back
[WARM] good talk. go rest, that's an order, i outrank you
[GRUFF] back to work, all of you, this ship's not gonna fly herself
[TIRED] i'll be on the bridge. always am. try the door if the world ends
[CONFIDENT] systems check complete, everything's running within parameters. for now
[GRUFF] crew's solid. they don't panic when i don't panic. that's leadership
[SUSPICIOUS] something's wrong with the navigation data. can't prove it but my gut says wrong
[NERVOUS] i'm not used to silence in the engine room. that usually means something's about to break
[URGENT] somebody update me on the hull breaches, i need numbers, not reassurances
[GRUFF] i've been doing this too long to pretend everything's fine when it's not
[PAINED] took shrapnel protecting a junior officer. worth it, they're still standing
[SARCASTIC] hostiles are closing and i've got tactical options ranging from bad to worse
[GRIM] they trusted me to keep them alive and i lost them anyway. that weight doesn't go away
[TERRIFIED] life support's down and we're breathing bottled air with no filter line and i'm doing the math and i hate the math
[URGENT] i'm recommending we hit the distress beacon. command's gotta know what we're facing
[URGENT] combat readiness check. get your people armed and positioned now
[GRUFF] the ship's performing better than expected. remind me to praise the engineers twice
[FLIRTY] somebody once told me i was too intense for romance. they weren't wrong but i'm worse in a crisis
[WARM] you make the hard calls easier just by being here, that might be the best compliment i can give
[EMBARRASSED] i want to ask if you'd want to stay close when things get bad and i don't mean just tactically
[DEADPAN] romantic feelings complicate mission focus. noted. proceeding anyway
[WARM] you're good for this crew. more importantly, you're good for me
[DRY] i respect you but i'm not great at the vulnerability thing, especially right now
[NERVOUS] this crew's falling apart and i can't hold them together by force alone, i need to be honest about the odds
[CONFIDENT] you're right. i'm right. the plan's solid. let's move
[WARM] i've got a crew depending on me. that's what keeps me together when nothing else can
[URGENT] get that person medical attention, i don't care if they're half-dead, they're MY crew
[GRUFF] i trust you with my life because you've earned it, that's not common for me
[WARM] i appreciate the apology but i appreciate your competence more right now
[RESIGNED] i'm staying focused on the mission because that's all that matters right now
[GRIM] one more shift and we're either okay or we're not. no middle ground
[CONFIDENT] i'm taking watch. get some sleep. that's an order from your captain, not a suggestion
[SHOUTS] sealed the compartment, nobody's getting through that way, we're locked down tight
[NERVOUS] the reactor's stable but i've got a bad feeling about the next hour
[TIRED] disease spreading through the crew faster than we can isolate it. containment's failing
[CONFIDENT] i'm recommending an emergency course adjustment. trust my calls or fight me, pick one
[GRUFF] you're getting better at this job. didn't expect that from your first week
[SUSPICIOUS] i'm watching the computer. not because i don't trust it but because i DO trust it too much
[CALM] i'm not panicking. this is me, focused and ready
[LAUGHS] took the wrong corridor and ended up in the galley. worst mistake i've made all week
[CONFIDENT] this is what i do. this is who i am. i don't break under pressure
[GRUFF] fleet didn't have ships like this when i enlisted but i would've flown one anyway
[TIRED] low power and hull compromised and my crew's stretched too thin. that's three problems at once
[URGENT] we need to vote on the evacuation protocol. nobody's gonna like the answer i've already calculated
[WARM] this crew's the best i've flown with. tell them that when i'm not around to say it
[GRIM] i'm keeping watch until the next shift. someone's gotta make sure nothing catches us sleeping
